steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The statement says "in 1995, Mexico mined ______" and asks for the value from the table. The task is purely to read the correct cell: Mexico's row, 1995 column.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '0.38 million metric tons of copper': This is Peru's 1995 value, not Mexico's. ✗
  • Choice B — '0.33 million metric tons of copper': This matches Mexico's 1995 cell in the table. ✓
  • Choice C — '1.85 million metric tons of copper': This is the United States' 1995 value. ✗
  • Choice D — '0.44 million metric tons of copper': This is Indonesia's 1995 value. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
